namespace Threadlink.Shared
{
    public static partial class ThreadlinkIDs
    {
        public static class Vault
        {
            /// <summary>
            /// AUTO-GENERATED BY THREADLINK'S CODEGEN. DO NOT EDIT MANUALLY.
            /// <para></para>
            /// ID Markers of the data fields populating Vault assets.
            /// </summary>
            public enum Fields : ushort
            {
                #region Native Vault Fields:
                None = 0,
                #endregion

                #region User Vault Fields:
                {User-Defined Data Field IDs}
                #endregion
            }
        }
    }
}
